tools.name: searxng_web_search
tools.description: Searches the web using SearXNG. CRITICAL: The parameter name MUST be exactly `query` (not `prompt`, `q`, or any other name). Pass your search terms as the value of the `query` parameter.

query.description: The search query string. This is the required parameter name — use exactly `query`, not `prompt` or `q`.

time_range.description: Time range of search (day, month, year)

language.description: Language code for search results (e.g., 'en', 'fr', 'de'). Default is instance-dependent.

safesearch.description: Safe search filter level (0: None, 1: Moderate, 2: Strict)

tools.name: web_url_read
tools.description: Read the content from an URL. Use this for further information retrieving to understand the content of each URL.

startChar.description: Starting character position for content extraction (default: 0)

maxLength.description: Maximum number of characters to return

section.description: Extract content under a specific heading (searches for heading text)

readHeadings.description: Return only a list of headings instead of full content
